nasb.text: Many shepherds have ruined My vineyard, They have trampled down My field; They have made My pleasant field A desolate wilderness.

esv.text: Many shepherds have destroyed my vineyard; they have trampled down my portion; they have made my pleasant portion a desolate wilderness.

cnv.text: 許多牧人毀壞了我的葡萄園， 踐踏了我的田地； 他們使我美好的田地 變為荒涼的曠野。

ccb.text: 列国的首领毁坏我的葡萄园， 践踏我美好的土地， 使它荒凉；
